  as={"h2"}

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["definitionType","config"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"自动化名称"},"definitionType":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON"],"description":"自动化定义类型，当前仅支持 SCRIPT_JSON","title":"AutomationDefinitionType"},"config":{"type":"object","description":"JSON 自动化脚本，详情请参考 [JSON 自动化脚本定义](../../aqara-studio/api-references/json-automation-script)。","additionalProperties":true}},"title":"CreateAutomationRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
